steps.title: Recognize the form y equals px plus r
steps.content: The given equation is in slope-intercept form. In this standard form, the coefficient $p$ (multiplying $x$) is the slope of the line, and $r$ is the y-intercept.

steps.title: Identify the slope and find p
steps.content: The problem states the line has a slope of $9$. Since $p$ is the slope in slope-intercept form, $p = 9$.
